workspace_authority.canonical_conversation_workspace: HELIX — Governed Agent Engineering is the umbrella ChatGPT project for governed agent architecture and coordination. ServiceTracer — Governed Azure Operations Lab is the bounded repository workstream for this implementation. Conversation context supports reasoning; it does not override repository or runtime evidence.
workspace_authority.implementation_authority: GitHub, pull requests, CI, and repository .project state determine implemented and coordinated ServiceTracer work.
workspace_authority.azure_authority: Current Azure control-plane, guest, workflow-artifact, cost, health, configuration, and operational evidence determine environment state.
workspace_authority.conflict_rule: Surface conflicts explicitly. Newer or higher-authority evidence does not silently erase historical evidence.

workstreams.title: Architecture and design decisions
workstreams.purpose: Define component responsibilities, trust boundaries, protocols, authority, evidence models, state transitions, and accepted tradeoffs.
workstreams.claim_boundary: Architecture and ADR material establishes approved or proposed intent; source, tests, CI, and runtime evidence are required to prove implementation or operation.

workstreams.title: Azure resource plan and IaC
workstreams.purpose: Maintain the target Azure topology, Bicep definitions, parameters, lifecycle workflows, validation, deployment sequencing, and rollback design.
workstreams.claim_boundary: Committed IaC and workflows prove versioned intent and implementation only. A reviewed What-If, successful deployment, and environment verification are separate evidence states.

workstreams.title: Deployment evidence and screenshots
workstreams.purpose: Preserve sanitized repository events, deployment records, portal or CLI screenshots, workflow identities, timestamps, hashes, versions, manual repairs, and post-deployment verification.
workstreams.claim_boundary: Repository events, screenshots, and summaries support a bounded claim only when their source, timestamp, target, and completeness are known. Curated history is not live status, and sensitive raw artifacts remain protected and uncommitted.

workstreams.title: Cost, health, and configuration telemetry
workstreams.purpose: Track Azure cost, budgets, resource health, service health, metrics, configuration snapshots, drift, and observation freshness without conflating control-plane state with guest health.
workstreams.claim_boundary: Telemetry is time-bound evidence. Cost estimates are not invoices; control-plane observations do not prove guest or application health; stale observations must be invalidated or superseded.

workstreams.title: ServiceTracer findings and reports
workstreams.purpose: Maintain deterministic service paths, evidence ingestion, localization findings, confidence limits, contradictions, bounded technician handoffs, and sanitized public reports.
workstreams.claim_boundary: ServiceTracer localizes the last successful stage, first failed transition, and suspect fault domain from supplied evidence. It does not claim an exact device root cause without additional verified evidence.

workstreams.title: Portfolio/demo narrative
workstreams.purpose: Explain the problem, governed architecture, controlled incident, verification workflow, evidence chain, limitations, and demonstrated engineering outcomes.
workstreams.claim_boundary: Narrative material must preserve the repository state vocabulary and may not present proposed, CI-verified, deployed, manually repaired, or operationally verified states as equivalent.
